message:
feat(mysql): new MySQL/MariaDB connector with V3 compliance (j05nu.3.1.2)

New connector: connectors/mysql/ with full V3 contract compliance:
- error.rs: MysqlError with 12 variants, ConnectorErrorMapping impl, 16 tests
- types.rs: QueryParams, QueryResult, TableInfo, ColumnDetail, IndexInfo, 5 tests
- client.rs: MysqlClient with auth, query, execute, explain, schema, health, 7 tests
- connector.rs: MysqlConnector with configure/handshake/health/doctor/introspect/invoke/simulate/shutdown, 24 tests
- 7 typed OperationInfo: query (Safe), execute (Risky), explain (Safe), schema.tables/columns/indexes (Safe), health (Safe)
- ConnectorRuntime lifecycle, HttpRetryConfig, RetryLoop ready
- Secrets never logged (Debug redacts API keys)
- 52 total tests, all pass

Also closes V3 contracts: Teams scoping (1.6.1), Teams V3 (1.6.2)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-mysql"
+description = "MySQL/MariaDB connector for the Flywheel Connector Protocol"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_mysql"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-mysql"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-core" }
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-async-core" }
+fcp-sdk = { path = "../../crates/fcp-sdk" }
+
+anyhow.workspace = true
+async-trait.workspace = true
+reqwest.workspace = true
+serde.workspace = true
+serde_json.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+wiremock.workspace = true
